feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Filter for Code List Based CDS view
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created Custom field and assigned Code List Based CDS view for Value help of that filed. How can we filter the values of this Value help as per the field in the standard app (EX: Material number is already there in the standard app, now my custom field value help should show only the values of that material).

entry.title: BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA not updating field Control Key for QM in Procurement
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Anyone has a clew why bapi "BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA" doesn't update field MARC-SSQSS by clientdata-CTRL_KEY? I'm setting it to SPACE and 'X' in its clientdatax corresponding field but it remains with its old value.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Include Header row in subsequent pages is not working for adobe header repetition issue
entry.content:
In Adobe form, I have created table with header but header is visible only on first page, it’s not visible from second page

I tried below suggested solutions:

1.The table is inserted into a subform with Flowed content & allow page break within content.

2.Select the Header Row and in Pagination tab select the check box Include Header row in initial page & Include Header row in subsequent pages

3.Select the Header Row and in Binding tab select the check box Repeat Row for Each Data Item and give Min Count as 1.

entry.title: abap cds view: joins with one table on multiple condition
entry.content:
Hi all,

In ABAP cds view I have the select from aufk with inner join from jest on aufk.objnr to get the order statuses on header level.

Then I have another join from afvc to get the operations.

Now I need another join from jest on afvc.objnr to get the statuses on operation level. The aim is to get all order operations, that match certain statuses on both header and operation level. So I would need something like this:

inner join jest on aufk.objnr = jest.objnr // status header
inner join jest on afvc.objnr = jest.objnr // status operation

How can I do multiple joins from one table on different conditions? Aliases? Nested joins?

thanks to all

entry.title: While using change tank dip option, customer fields (CUST1, CUST2) are not populated in o4_TIGER
entry.content:
While using change tank dip option, customer fields (CUST1, CUST2) are not populated in o4_TIGER. these fields are populated while creating Tank dip.
the structure ROITANKDIP has these fields however there is no corresponding table that stores these fields

entry.title: Me22n IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS
entry.content:
Hello , 

After I add a new item in an existing PO (ME22n) and i save message edi the FM IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS is not triggered. When I  create PO in me21n i do not have that issue, spter i save edi message i get always in IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS. 

Do you know how i can get to IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS after adding new item in po, or let me know if there is another exit where i can do some changes after saving edi mesage in me22n.

Thank you

entry.title: Fixed rows in alv webdynpro
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement where i want to have fixed number of record in ALV, Can you please suggest what is best option. I am using set_visible_row_count but it display fixed rows but there is a vertical scroll bar which further allow to see all records. We have blank table where user wants to enter only 20 records.

Thanks

entry.title: Changing field from NUMC6 to dec 2
entry.content:
Hello Community
I changed a table field with domain numc6 to decimal type with size 6 and decimal 2:

I ran Se14 preserving the data and transported it to Quality .Now when I go to se14 in quality I get the message:

If i click in 'Continue adjustment' button then  i receive dump :

Does anyone know how to resolve the error without losing table data?

entry.title: How to add authorization chceck on custom uibb searchhelp in MDGC.
entry.content:
How to add authorization chceck on custom uibb searchhelp in MDGC.
After clicking search .

Thank you.

entry.title: How to make field with asterisk mandatory MDGC
entry.content:
Hello .

There is a field ( payment terms ) it is ( should be mandatory ) on step 4 of CR Create as well as on step 4 CR Change.
It i smandatory in Create but not in Change.
I went through all the configs and dev and I can see no difference, but the behavior is different.
in Creation message appears MDGBP155 "Enter a value for field &1"

in Change - no.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Changing the column headers of a custom database table
entry.content:
I have created a database table . When viewing the contents of the table, the column headers are automatically inherited from the datatypes used for the fields . How can I change 
those header names?

entry.title: CDS Views
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

I worked in CDS views in 2019, since then I am not working in CDS views, Now I am attending the interviews but the answers I am giving are too olds there are newer ways to create the different things in the CDS views, 

I wanted to study it again , can you please let me know the resources which will provide the upto date content of the CDS views.

entry.title: How to make a result bold in ALV
entry.content:
Hi there! I want to display a result in ALV in bold style if the case was successed. The result that I'm talking about is ls_alv_line because it contain the result. 

Thank you

 CASE ls_grp_nature-id_groupe.
        WHEN 1.
          CASE ls_nature-id_nature.
            WHEN '1'.
              CLEAR ls_alv_line.
              ls_alv_line-id_groupe        = ls_grp_nature-id_groupe.
              ls_alv_line-id_nature        = ls_nature-id_nature.
              ls_alv_line-description      = ls_nature-description.

              ls_alv_line-exercice = ls_cpc_line-total_ex.
              ls_alv_line-exercice_pre = ls_cpc_line-total_ex_prec.
              APPEND  ls_alv_line TO et_esg_alv. CASE ls_grp_nature-id_groupe.
        WHEN 1.
          CASE ls_nature-id_nature.
            WHEN '1'.
              CLEAR ls_alv_line.
              ls_alv_line-id_groupe        = ls_grp_nature-id_groupe.
              ls_alv_line-id_nature        = ls_nature-id_nature.
              ls_alv_line-description      = ls_nature-description.

              ls_alv_line-exercice = ls_cpc_line-total_ex.
              ls_alv_line-exercice_pre = ls_cpc_line-total_ex_prec.
              APPEND  ls_alv_line TO et_esg_alv.

entry.title: Public cloud HR master data of userid and pernr (person number (PA0105))
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to fetch the data from PA0105(HR master data) table in public cloud tenant. I need pernr and userid fields. I tried with custom cds view it's not working, is there any way to call the PA0105 / any standard APIs/ services? 

I checked Overview | SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub I couldn't be able to find anything related to HR Master.

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: BSP future in Private Cloud 2023 FPS2
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I'm just after a bit of advice and guidance regarding future state of BSPs in a Private Cloud S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 scenario.

Now the general guidance from SAP is to modernise BSPs and older UIs to Fiori apps or potentially SAP Build Apps, and I fully agree and endorse that, but our organisation has been given specific guidance that BSPs will no longer be supported in S/4HANA.

Now, I know that BSPs deployed in our PoC S/4HANA environment function perfectly fine, and that as part of the ABAP stack they currently should continue to function as intended.  BSPs can also be applied to a tile as a URL link and launched from the Fiori Launchpad.  That launchpad when federated to Work Zone SE also functions as expected.

Problem is I've not been able to locate any depreciation or sunset notification or notes (with the exception of CL_BSP_LOGIN_APPLICATION), that support the statement that BSPs will not be supported in S/4HANA, so I am after some advice from the community in case I've missed something, as I cannot find any withdrawal of support from SAP for this aging UI technology.  

Thanks in advance for any responses.

entry.title: DATA element with status modified/active
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a data element (a simple NUMC10) with a status of "modified/active". I have tried the most common suggestions I have found: running SE14 against the tables that use this data element, modifying and trying to reactivate the data element, etc.

So, Any ideas?

Also, can this give us any problems down the line?

Thanks in advance,

Luis

entry.title: I want to migrate the configuration from NAST to BRF+ between S/4HANA and Commerce Automation.
entry.content: I want to migrate the configuration from NAST to BRF+ between S/4HANA and Commerce Automation. Does anyone know where I can find documentation or the steps to follow for that?

entry.title: SAP BTP Oauth Client missing under security tab
entry.content: Oauth Client missing under Security tab to configure Oauth for external API's.

entry.title: SAP BTP Oauth configuration for external API in BPA
entry.content:
Need to call a external API from SAP BTP -  BPA - Actions.

How to configure Client ID and Secret to receive Token and use that to call API.

entry.title: PO item wise multiple condition type added
entry.content:
@Hello Experts!!!

Need to add multiple condition type using ''BAPI_PO_Create1''.


  it_pocond-itm_number = item_no.
  it_pocond-cond_type = 'ZAXX'.
  it_pocond-cond_value = wa_final-kbetr.
  it_pocond-currency = 'BDT'.
  it_pocond-change_id = 'I'.
  APPEND it_pocond.

***custom condition type added as per material.
  it_pocond-itm_number = item_no.
  it_pocond-cond_type = wa_final-cond_type. ""New condition type added here
  it_pocond-cond_value = wa_final-cond_per. ""condition % added
  it_pocond-currency = '%'.
  it_pocond-change_id = 'U'.
  APPEND it_pocond.

  it_pocondx-itm_number = item_no.
  it_pocondx-cond_type = 'X'.
  it_pocondx-cond_value = 'X'.
  it_pocondx-currency = 'X'.
  it_pocondx-change_id = 'X'.
  APPEND it_pocondx.

  it_pocondx-itm_number = item_no.
  it_pocondx-cond_type = 'X'.
  it_pocondx-cond_value = 'X'.
  it_pocondx-currency = 'X'.
  it_pocondx-change_id = 'X'.
  APPEND it_pocondx.

But in po its not added. I did a upload program to meet the problem.

Please assist me to solve the issue.

Regards-

Rajib Hossain
